skip_reason: Individual Snapchat Spotlight post URLs are not permanently stable - the storyId in the URL can change or the specific post can be removed/replaced over time, which would break this test unpredictably even though the bookmarklet itself still works. Skipping until a guaranteed-stable public Spotlight post URL is identified.
notes: Passive - V9 modal (id: __scSpotlightModal) titled 'Snapchat Spotlight Data'. On individual post pages (/@user/spotlight/SNAP_ID, variant: spotlight_snap) reads __NEXT_DATA__ → props.pageProps.videoMetadata directly for uploadDateMs (ms epoch), contentUrl, creator username/name, viewCount, durationMs. Falls back to spotlightStoryMetadata[0].videoMetadata for profile hub pages where videoMetadata is absent. Upload Date shown with dual ISO+local format and 🚨 if within 7 days. Export row has Copy Data/JSON/CSV buttons plus Extracted timestamp. Alerts 'No date data found on this page.' if no timestamp found. NOTE: Snapchat dropped JSON-LD in mid-2025; schema differs between individual post pages (pp.videoMetadata) and profile hub pages (pp.spotlightStoryMetadata array).
